title: Samuel Groves Pack of 2 Pizza Pan, Pizza Tray, Large 13 Inch (33cm) Non Stick Coating Oven Round Crisper, Pizza Baking Tray, Pizza Trays for Oven Non Stick Made in England
features: The Great British Bakeware Range is a best-selling collection of non-stick coated bakeware, This non stick pizza tray is specifically designed to bring out the best in your pizzas,
The non-stick coating ensures uniform thickness for even wear, helping to create the perfect pizza crust with consistent texture, balanced cooking, and a deliciously crisp yet tender bite every time.

The tray is oven safe up to 220°C (428°F) and usable in the fridge and freezer. It's BPA, PTFE, and PFOA-free for safety. Made in England, it ensures top quality, durability, and reliable performance.
The crisping tray is perfect for pizzas and enhances the crunch of oven chips, wedges, and more. It’s a versatile tool for daily recipes, ensuring even cooking and a deliciously crispy texture.
The pizza pan has heat-transferring holes for crispy crusts on homemade or store-bought pizzas. With external dimensions of 33cm (13 inches), it's a great size for most pizzas, ensuring even cooking.
description: Product Description Great British Bakeware The Great British Bakeware range is a premium collection of high-performance non-stick bakeware, thoughtfully designed and proudly manufactured in England. Renowned for its quality, durability, and reliable results, it has become a favourite among both home bakers and professionals. Premium Non Stick Pizza Tray Enjoy your baking with the 33cm Non-Stick twin pack pizza tray from The Great British Bakeware Range, durable, reliable, and crafted for exceptional performance. Create a delicious pizza with this premium tray! ILAG Non-Stick Coating Swiss ILAG Technology This pizza tray features a premium Swiss ILAG two-coat non-stick professional finish, delivering exceptional performance with every use. The advanced mineral-based coating ensures effortless food release, making cooking and baking cleaner, quicker, and more enjoyable. Crafted For Quality Our products are proudly made in England. Our pizza tray boasts a new and improved double coating non-stick surface, making baking and cleaning a breeze. No more worries about your pizza's sticking to the pan! Premium Quality Products Our Great British Bakeware range offers premium quality products at affordable prices. Proudly Made in England our range is built to last and eco-friendly. They have a professional non stick coating and are BPA and PFOA free!
